text.name: You need Wood to repair this boat
You need Duct Tape to repair this boat
You can repair this boat with the Wood you're carrying
You can repair this boat with the Duct Tape you're carrying
The boat is repaired. You can sail to the next island. You cannot return to this one.
Supplies will be dropped after the video ad
"Hello, survivor! Want to trade? Here's what I have:"
The box could contain anything from food to firearms
Billy "The Radical" Unlock: Kill 5 Infected with a shotgun On any difficulty
Emilio "The Doctor" Unlock: Stop bleeding 6 times On any difficulty
Dave "The Boxer" Unlock: Kill 10 Infected unarmed On any difficulty
Lee "The Madman" Unlock: Kill a hostile survivor with an axe On "Regular" difficulty or higher
Sergey "The Slav" Unlock: Kill 3 survivors at once On "Regular" difficulty or higher
John "The Biker" Unlock: Wear a Jacket, Motorcycle Helmet, and carry a Wrench On "Regular" difficulty or higher
Ganzo "The Dragon" Unlock: Kill 4 hostile survivors with firearms On "Veteran" difficulty or higher
Tom "The Survivor" Unlock: Survive 7 days On "Veteran" difficulty or higher
Garry "The Veteran" Unlock: Wear a full Gorka outfit at once On "Veteran" difficulty or higher
Billy "The Radical" Equipment: Jeans, T-shirt, Bandana Special Skill: Marksman
Emilio "The Doctor" Equipment: Medic Pants, T-shirt, Bandage Special Skill: Vitality
Dave "The Boxer" Equipment: Jeans, T-shirt, Rag Special Skill: Blocking Expert
Lee "The Madman" Equipment: Jeans, Dress, Gas Mask, Butcher Knife Special Skill: Cozy Home
John "The Biker" Equipment: Jeans, Jacket, Motorcycle Helmet, Wrench Special Skill: Sprinter
Sergey "The Slav" Equipment: Tracksuit Pants, Tracksuit Jacket, Balaclava, Baseball Bat Special Skill: Lethal Strike
Ganzo "The Dragon" Equipment: Hunting Pants, Bow, Composite Arrows×5 Special Skills: Sprinter, Cold Resistance
Tom "The Survivor" Equipment: Jeans, T-shirt, Cowboy Hat, Hunter Knife, Makeshift Backpack Special Skills: Hunter, Survival Instinct
Garry "The Veteran" Equipment: Jeans, T-shirt, Cap, Bulletproof Vest, Colt 1911 Pistol Special Skills: Marksman, Scouting
Cannot connect to Airdrop Center! Please check your internet connection
Kill 5/15/30 Infected with bows or crossbows
Survive 10/20/30 hits from Infected or animals
Kill 5/15/30 Infected with semi-auto or bolt-action rifles
Reach a city on at least 1/2/3 island(s)
Place 1/2/3 wooden fences or barbed wire
Find the medieval castle, a testament to a glorious era
Enter the bunker, a military fortress that failed to stop the virus
Equip a full protective suit and gas mask
Kill all types of special Infected on Hell difficulty
You can fight unarmed or with melee weapons. Melee combat happens automatically when close to an enemy. Each melee weapon has a chance to block or deal critical damage.
For ranged weapons, aiming is automatic. Firing is manual. Accuracy is greatly reduced while running.
Campfires provide heat, light, and a way to cook food. Can be lit up to three times after placing.
You can plant vegetables for food. They might wither depending on the weather.
You can craft items using other items. You can find and collect them.

When injured, you may start bleeding. While bleeding, health won't regenerate and you'll lose health over time. Use Bandages, Rags, or Medical Tape to stop bleeding. Bleeding can also stop naturally over time.

Entering some areas without protection, or being attacked by some Infected, can poison you. If your temperature gets too low, you'll get sick. When sick or poisoned, health won't regenerate and Immunity will decrease. To cure sickness or poisoning, take Tetracycline. Alternatively, maintain Immunity, Thirst, Hunger, and Temperature above 80%.
Cold weather lowers your body temperature. It gets colder at night, during rain or snow. After midnight, nights become pitch black.
Keep your Thirst, Hunger, Immunity, and Temperature above 50%. Otherwise, your health will not regenerate.
If your health reaches zero, you die. You may start bleeding when injured. If your Thirst, Hunger, Immunity, or Temperature reach zero, you will also start bleeding.
Use Bandages or Rags to quickly stop bleeding. Some clothing can be torn into rags.
Use Blood Bags or Saline to restore health quickly.
If your Thirst, Hunger, Immunity, and Temperature are all above 50%, you will start regenerating health.
You can warm up inside buildings.
Wear warm clothing to stay warm.
Drink whiskey or beer to increase warmth temporarily.
Light a campfire to warm up.
Find and set up a tent; you can warm up inside it too.
Most supplies can be found in buildings.
Supplies can also be found in car trunks.
You can find berries on some bushes.
Use a Hatchet or Fire Axe to chop trees. Different trees yield different amounts of wood. Other useful resources can be found in the world.
Find a Headlamp or Night Vision device to see in the dark. They require batteries to work.
Flares can be thrown to light up a small area.
Campfires provide lasting light for a small area.
Water pumps contain drinkable water. You can drink directly from them. The water in a pump is limited per day.
You can fill Water Bottles or Canteens from pumps. During rain, placing a Water Bottle on the ground can also collect water.
Duct Tape restores 15% durability to items.
Sewing Kits restore 50% durability to clothing.
Cleaning Kits restore 25% durability to firearms.
You can find deer or rabbits in the wild. They are skittish, so you'll need a ranged weapon to take them down.
Use a knife to skin dead deer or rabbits, obtaining Raw Meat.
Raw Meat can be cooked over a fire to make Cooked Meat.
Makeshift Backpack + Stick×3 = Reinforced Makeshift Backpack
Place the Campfire Kit on the ground and light it with Matches.
Map will be available after the tutorial
Boats can be found on the east coast and repaired to reach the next island. Caution! Once you reach the next island, you cannot return to the previous one.
Place civilian tents to store supplies and provide warmth. Items stored in tents will not despawn.
Wooden Fences (Wood + Stick×5 = Wooden Fence) block enemies. Barbed Wire damages and slows them down.
Sharpshooter Level 1: Increases firearm critical hit chance by 10%. Level 2: Increases firearm critical damage by 30%.
Scout Level 1: Spot other survivors from further away. Level 2: Identify distant survivors from afar.
Sprinter Level 1: Movement speed increased by 5%. Level 2: Movement speed increased by 10%.
Thirst Resist Level 1: Thirst depletes 10% slower. Level 2: All canned drinks provide +10 extra thirst.
Hunger Resist Level 1: Hunger depletes 10% slower. Level 2: All canned foods provide +10 extra hunger.
Cold Resist Level 1: Heat loss reduced by 50% during rain or snow. Level 2: Grants +2 additional heat.
Bullet Collector Level 1: All found firearms contain at least 1 bullet. Level 2: All found ammunition stacks contain an extra 10 bullets.
Survival Instinct Level 1: Health regeneration rate increases when below 50% health. Level 2: Movement speed increased by 10% when below 20% health.
Blocking Expert Level 1: Melee weapon block chance increased by 5%. Level 2: Melee weapon block chance increased by 10%.
Lethal Strike Level 1: Melee weapon critical hit chance increased by 10%. Level 2: Melee weapon critical damage increased by 30%.
Thief Level 1: Chance to find supplies in car trunks increased by 20%. Level 2: Chance to find 2 supplies in car trunks increased by 10%.
Hunter Level 1: Animals are less likely to notice you. Level 2: 50% chance to get an extra piece of meat when skinning.
Cozy Home Level 1: Gain 50% extra heat when inside buildings. Level 2: Hunger and Thirst deplete 30% slower while sleeping.
Vitality Level 1: Bleeding rate reduced by 50%. Level 2: Natural bleeding stops 2x faster.
Vigilance Level 1: You can spot hidden enemies more clearly. Level 2: Your vision is slightly clearer at night.
Farmer Level 1: 50% chance to get an extra berry when foraging. Level 2: 50% chance to get an extra vegetable when harvesting.
You can repair this boat with Logs to reach the next island. Chop down a tree with an axe to get Logs.
There seem to be supplies here. Get closer to pick them up.
You can check your carried items in the backpack.
This is your quick access bar. It's available even without equipment slots. Click to select an item.
Welcome, survivor. You're stranded on an island. Your only way to reach other islands is to find a boat or bridge on the east coast.
Tap or drag to move your character.
Use the virtual joystick to move.
Choose your preferred movement style. You can change this anytime in settings.
You gain experience by killing enemies and surviving. Use experience points to unlock new skills.
Select a skill to invest points and learn it. Each skill has two levels.
Press the interact button to pick up items or interact with the world.
You now have a ranged weapon. Equip it to aim automatically. Press the fire button to shoot.
When you have compatible ammo, press the reload button to reload.
Switch between melee and ranged weapons in this order: Melee -> Primary -> Secondary.
You are bleeding. Find a Bandage, Medical Tape, or tear your T-shirt into Rags to bandage yourself.
You ran out of health. For the tutorial, your health will be restored so you can continue.
You can organize items in your backpack by dragging them.
That's a firearm. Guns can usually be found at military bases and gun stores.
An Infected is ahead. Your character will attack automatically when close.
That's a wolf. They're often found in packs and are dangerous.
That's a water pump. You can drink directly from it or fill containers.
That's an abandoned car. You can search the trunk for supplies.
You can hunt deer and use a knife to skin them for venison.
You can hunt rabbits and use a knife to skin them for rabbit meat.
Look around. You can pick berries from some bushes.
You need a full Gas Can to refuel this boat
Leave the bunker? Make sure you have your supplies.
Airdrops cannot be called inside bunkers
Watch the ad to wake up
You are about to die. Your only chance to continue playing is using this adrenaline injection after watching the video ad.
You need internet connection to proceed.
Red Dot Sight - Slightly reduces spread
Optic Scope - Reduces spread, increases critical chance
Suppressor - Eliminates muzzle flash and reduces gunshot noise
Kate "The Traveler" Equipment: Jeans, Raincoat, Civilian Tent, Headlamp Special Skills: Hunter, Vigilance
Jasmine "The Lumberjack" Equipment: Hunter Pants, T-shirt, Beret, Hatchet, Duct Tape Special Skills: Hunger Resist, Thirst Resist, Cold Resist
Aika "The War Correspondent" Equipment: Jeans, T-shirt, Cap, Press Vest, Canteen, Radio Special Skills: Sprinter, Scouting
Kate "The Traveler" Unlock: Find two drivable vehicles on the 4th island and beyond On "Veteran" difficulty or higher
Jasmine "The Lumberjack" Unlock: Lower your reputation to -100, then raise it to +100 in one run On "Veteran" difficulty or higher
Aika "The War Correspondent" Unlock: Complete 3 survivor tasks in one run On "Veteran" difficulty or higher
Hello, survivor! We are looking for
As a reward, you will receive
Thanks! Your reward is marked on the map.
A group of survivors is looking for:
Hey, survivor! We need help! A gang of bandits has set up camp nearby. Eliminate them, and we'll reward you with:
Did you find the supplies we need?
We spotted a boat on the east coast.
Hey, survivor! Our squad was ambushed, and we lost our supplies. If you can bring them back, I'll reward you with:
Eliminate them first, then come back.
Thanks! Your reward is marked on the map.
Some survivors lost their supplies. I could return them... Or keep them for myself.
Some survivors asked me to eliminate bandits.
Bandits eliminated. I can go back to those survivors for my reward.
MAC-10 SMG Unlock: Kill 200 Infected with pistols On "Regular" difficulty or higher Progress:
Saiga-12k Auto Shotgun Unlock: Kill 150 Infected with shotguns On "Regular" difficulty or higher Progress:
AUG Assault Rifle Unlock: Kill 200 Infected with any full-auto weapon On "Regular" difficulty or higher Progress:
MAC-10 SMG Unlocked Spawns in: Gun Stores, NATO Military Crashes, Bunkers
Saiga-12k Auto Shotgun Unlocked Spawns in: Gun Stores, Bunkers, Warsaw Pact Military Bases
AUG Assault Rifle Unlocked Spawns in: NATO Military Crashes, Bunkers, NATO Military Bases
AS-VAL Assault Rifle Unlock: Find 6 military crash sites in one run On "Legendary" difficulty Progress:
AS-VAL Assault Rifle Unlocked Spawns in: Bunkers
SV-98 Sniper Rifle Unlock: Kill 200 Infected with sniper rifles On "Veteran" difficulty or higher Progress:
SV-98 Sniper Rifle Unlocked Spawns in: Bunkers
MGL Grenade Launcher Unlock: Kill a "Tank" 3 times with explosives On "Legendary" difficulty Progress:
MGL Grenade Launcher Unlocked Spawns in: Radiation Zone Bunkers
Press this button when ready for the next wave
• New festive Infected appear when it snows • New cosmetic item - Santa Hat • New item - Christmas Mystery Box
• Includes a set of expanded features
Feature - Equal Exchange Allows converting between certain similar item types
Feature - Item Locker +6 extra capacity Allows items inside to be carried over to the next game Saved:
Feature - Build Mode Allows unconditional storage of all placeable structures
Feature - Experience Shop Allows trading experience for supplies
• Weapons, equipment, and vehicles don't break • (May reduce survival challenge)
• Health cap increased by 50% • Hunger and Thirst caps doubled
• Respawn on the west coast after death
• Enemy health bars hidden • Significantly more Infected
• Ordinary Infected are more likely to become special Infected • From Island 3, Infected health and damage increased by 50% • From Island 5, Infected health and damage increased by an additional 50%
• Staying awake at night causes fatigue • A Blood Moon occurs every 7 days • All Infected can sense you during a Blood Moon
• NPCs with automatic weapons will fire continuously
Achievements cannot be unlocked in Special Modes
Achievements must be completed in a single run. Achievements have three tiers: Copper, Silver, Gold. You can unlock higher tiers on higher difficulties.
Are you sure you want to exit the game? Tutorial progress will not be saved
Exit the game? Your progress will be saved.
Rabbit A common hare that flees at high speed from anything approaching. Health: 5
Deer A common deer, wary of all living things around it. Health: 80
Albino Deer An extremely rare albino deer, its white fur blending perfectly with the snow. Health: 80
Wolf A dangerous predator in the wild, often hunting in packs. Health: 50
Chicken Once domesticated, now still found on farms. Health: 5
Dog The most loyal companion, able to provide much help. Health: N/A
Infected Ordinary people who didn't survive the outbreak. Now they try to tear apart any living thing they see. Health: 60 / 120 (Radiation Zone)
Crawler Moves faster than common Infected, making them more dangerous. Health: 80 / 160 (Radiation Zone)
Lurker Unlike others, it doesn't actively seek targets. Instead, it hides, waiting to ambush the careless. Health: 60 / 120 (Radiation Zone)
Infected Soldier An infected soldier, possessing a stronger physique than common Infected. Health: 100 / 200 (Radiation Zone)
Yellow Hazmat Infected A bloated Infected, its protective suit filled with lethal corrosive liquid that spills out upon death. Health: 80 / 160 (Radiation Zone)
Red Hazmat Infected Prolonged contact with chemicals caused a horrifying mutation, granting higher speed and more lethal fluids. Health: 120 / 240 (Radiation Zone)
Roarer This weak Infected cannot harm you, but it will roar to attract nearby Infected to swarm you. Health: 50 / 100 (Radiation Zone)
Infected Police The virus preserved its instinct to use firearms, making it more dangerous than common Infected. Health: 100 / 200 (Radiation Zone)
Infected Officer A trained officer before infection, possessing a stronger physique and the retained instinct to use firearms. Health: 120 / 240 (Radiation Zone)
Riot Infected This fully armored individual from their former life is now just another member of the infected horde. Health: 250 / 500 (Radiation Zone)
Leaper The virus drastically strengthened its jumping ability, allowing it to pounce on targets. Health: 150 / 300 (Radiation Zone)
Spitter The virus filled its mouth with toxic fluid. It will try to spit at any living thing it sees. Health: 100 / 200 (Radiation Zone)
Runner Once an优秀 athlete, its former agility allows it to try and dodge your ranged attacks. Health: 100 / 200 (Radiation Zone)
Infected Instructor The virus retained its strength and agility, and it will try to dodge your ranged attacks. Health: 120 / 240 (Radiation Zone)
Armed Gorka An infected soldier in good gear. The virus preserved its instinct to fire continuously at living targets. Health: 175 / 350 (Radiation Zone)
Heavy Armor Infected A well-equipped infected. The heavy armor it wore in life now protects it exceptionally well. Health: N/A / 1000 (Radiation Zone)
Glowing One Prolonged radiation exposure caused a terrifying mutation, making it faster and more lethal. Health: N/A / 500 (Radiation Zone)
Infected Researcher A researcher trying to find a cure. Infected and injected with a failed serum, causing an extremely terrifying mutation. Health: N/A / 1000 (Radiation Zone)
Tank An utterly terrifying infected. The virus drastically strengthened its body and strength. Engaging it in melee is perhaps a foolish decision. Health: 2000 / 4000 (Radiation Zone)
[Winter Content Pack] Special - Snowman This Roarer was, ironically, wrapped in Christmas lights. Looks like zombies need holidays too. Health: 50 / 100 (Radiation Zone)
Survivor Neutral Survivor: Won't attack you, may try to trade. Hostile Survivor: Attacks other survivors for loot. Friendly Survivor: Peaceful, may accompany you in the apocalypse. Health: 100
Black Ops Dangerous faction in the apocalypse, equipped with good gear, hostile to all other survivors. Health: 110
Gorka Black Ops A leader among the Black Ops, better equipped and more dangerous. Health: 250
Hazmat Black Ops An exploration team sent by the Black Ops faction into the radiation zone. Equipped with better weapons to deal with the stronger Infected. Health: 150
You can repair this boat with Logs to reach the next island. Chop down a tree with an axe to get Logs.
There seem to be supplies here. Get closer to pick them up.
You can check your carried items in the backpack.
This is your quick access bar. It's available even without equipment slots. Click to select an item.
Welcome, survivor. You're stranded on an island. Your only way to reach other islands is to find a boat or bridge on the east coast.
Tap or drag to move your character.
Use the virtual joystick to move.
Choose your preferred movement style. You can change this anytime in settings.
You gain experience by killing enemies and surviving. Use experience points to unlock new skills.
Select a skill to invest points and learn it. Each skill has two levels.
Press the interact button to pick up items or interact with the world.
You now have a ranged weapon. Equip it to aim automatically. Press the fire button to shoot.
When you have compatible ammo, press the reload button to reload.
Switch between melee and ranged weapons in this order: Melee -> Primary -> Secondary.
You are bleeding. Find a Bandage, Medical Tape, or tear your T-shirt into Rags to bandage yourself.
You ran out of health. For the tutorial, your health will be restored so you can continue.
You can organize items in your backpack by dragging them.
That's a firearm. Guns can usually be found at military bases and gun stores.
An Infected is ahead. Your character will attack automatically when close.
That's a wolf. They're often found in packs and are dangerous.
That's a water pump. You can drink directly from it or fill containers.
That's an abandoned car. You can search the trunk for supplies.
You can hunt deer and use a knife to skin them for venison.
You can hunt rabbits and use a knife to skin them for rabbit meat.
Look around. You can pick berries from some bushes.
